title: Invincible Protocol
description: Invincible Protocol is a RPG Modpack for players wanting to play in the world of Invincible!
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Invincible_Protocol/BH_Invincible_Protocol_header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Invincible_Protocol/BH_Invincible_Protocol_promo2.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Overview](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Invincible_Protocol/BH_Invincible_Protocol_overview.webp)
---
**Invincible Protocol** is a Modpack based on the Invincible cartoon and comic. Human, viltrumite, flaxan, marshan... what path will you choose? Fly between planets and conquer them, fight all matter of Invincible based characters, from humans to conquest! Wear your favourite characters clothing and choose from all their abilites, fight to the death or fight for glory.

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/invincible-protocol)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/invincible-protocol)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/K6ZQbKZSQ4A?si=B0ZSyiUDvmhKT8tm" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Invincible_Protocol/BH_Invincible_Protocol_features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **Invincible** - All you favourite characters, planets and abilities have been added.
- [✔️] **World Generation** - A world of realism awaits, can you protect the vast cities sprawled across the world.
- [✔️] **Performance** - Fully optimised, jump between planets with shaders on and experience fights to the best with all the custom effects and more!

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Invincible_Protocol/BH_Invincible_Protocol_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
